info.title: SkillSwap API
info.description: API specification for the SkillSwap application

post.description:
Register a new user.
Expects POST: name, email, password

Login existing user.
Expects POST: email, password

delete.description: DELETE a match. Only admin may delete matches. Cascade-deletes reviews and recalculates affected ratings.

get.summary: List matches for the current user
get.description: GET list matches for the current user with optional pagination. Expects GET: limit (optional), offset (optional).

post.description:
Render create match form (GET) and handle creation (POST).
Expects either ?offer_id=... (to match an offer) or ?request_id=... (to match a request)

get.description: Render profile matches for the current user (HTML view)

get.summary: Find mutual matches for the current user
get.description: Find mutual matches for the current user. Expects GET: limit (optional).

post.description:
Accept a proposed match (create Match record and mark accepted).
Expects POST: matched_user_id, my_offer_id, my_request_id, their_offer_id, their_request_id, score
Mark a match as completed. Expects POST: match_id

get.description: API: list offers (JSON) with optional filtering.

post.description: Render create offer form (GET) and handle creation (POST).

get.summary: Browse offers (HTML view or JSON list)
get.description: Render browse offers page (HTML) or return JSON list.

200.description: List of offers or HTML view

delete.description: API: delete an offer (JSON POST id).

get.description: Render current user's offers (profile/offers).

post.description: Edit an offer (owner or admin). GET renders form, POST applies update and redirects to profile/offers.
Delete an offer by id (owner or admin). Accepts POST and redirects to profile/offers.

get.description: Render profile view for current authenticated user.

put.description: Edit profile: GET renders edit form, POST applies changes and redirects to profile.

delete.description: Delete current user's account. Supports POST (form) and JSON API.

get.description: API: list requests (JSON) with optional filtering.

post.description:
Render create request form (GET) and handle creation (POST).
Inputs: title, desired_level (mapped to availability), notes (mapped to description), max_hours

get.summary: Browse requests (HTML view or JSON list)
get.description: Render browse requests page (HTML) or return JSON list.

200.description: List of requests or HTML view

delete.description: API: delete a request (JSON POST id).

get.description: Render current user's requests (profile/requests).
GET list reviews for a user. Requires user_id, optional limit and offset.
Render profile reviews page for current user (HTML)

get.summary: Admin: List all reviews with optional sorting
get.description: Admin index to list all reviews with optional sorting.

post.description: POST create a new review for a match. Requires reviewer_id, match_id, rating (1..5), and optional feedback.

put.description: PUT update an existing review. Requires review id and at least one of rating or feedback.

delete.description: DELETE delete a review by id. Admin or reviewer only.

get.description: GET list skills with optional filtering by name and pagination.

post.description: POST create a new skill. Admin only.

get.summary: Render skills index view (HTML) or return JSON list of skills
get.description: Render skills index view for HTML clients, or return JSON for API.

200.description: Skills index view or JSON list of skills

put.description: PUT update an existing skill. Admin only. Requires skill id and at least one of name or description.

delete.description: DELETE delete a skill by id. Admin only.

get.summary: Render form to edit a skill (admin only)
get.description: Edit skill (admin only): GET renders edit form, POST applies update and redirects.
Render all users view.
Show a single user's profile (users/{id}).

put.description: Edit a user (admin only). GET renders form, POST applies update and redirects.

delete.description: Delete a user (admin only). POST form or JSON supported.

get.description: Show offers posted by a user: users/{id}/offers
Show requests posted by a user: users/{id}/requests
Show reviews received by a user: users/{id}/reviews

id.description: MatchModel is responsible for handling match-related operations such as creating matches, retrieving matches for users, and updating match status.
OfferModel is responsible for handling offer-related operations such as creating new offers, filtering offers by skill and availability, and retrieving offers for specific users.
RequestModel is responsible for handling request-related operations such as creating new requests, filtering requests by skill and desired_level, and retrieving requests for specific users.
ReviewModel is responsible for handling review-related operations such as adding reviews for completed matches and retrieving reviews for users.
SkillModel is responsible for handling skill-related operations such as creating, updating, deleting, and listing skills.
UserModel is responsible for handling user-related operations such as registration and authentication.

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: Current user profile and account management
